service.name: OpenAI Batch API
service.description_for_ai: Process large volumes of OpenAI API requests at 50% discount. Submit batch of requests, results ready within 24 hours. Perfect for bulk classification, embedding, analysis tasks. Same models as regular API.

auth.cost: 50% discount vs regular API. gpt-4o-mini: $0.075/$0.30 per 1M tokens

capabilities.description_for_ai: Submit batch of up to 50,000 API requests for 50% discount. Results ready within 24h. Use for bulk analysis, classification, embedding generation.

input_file_id.description: ID of JSONL file uploaded via Files API containing requests

agent_hints.workflow: 1) Create JSONL file with requests. 2) Upload via /v1/files. 3) Create batch with file_id. 4) Poll /v1/batches/{id} until completed. 5) Download output file.
agent_hints.jsonl_format: Each line: {custom_id: req-1, method: POST, url: /v1/chat/completions, body: {model, messages, max_tokens}}
agent_hints.best_for: Bulk tasks where you have 1000s of items: classification, translation, embedding, extraction.
